case_title: CORNELL TURNER VS. DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DENNIS CHANG--PRESIDENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,380.00 FILED BY TURNER, CORNELL AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, CORNELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC. $50.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
